//: Drop this file into any repo under ~/repo/<profile>/<repo>/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json to get a 'Reopen in Container' workflow for that repo. Prerequisites: (1) profile stack running via scripts/profile.sh <profile> up, (2) repo-root .env contains PROFILE=<profile> and COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=ai-sandbox-<profile> (VS Code does NOT pass shell exports to docker compose). Adjust the dockerComposeFile path below if the sandbox repo is not a sibling at ~/repo/<profile>/windows-ai-sandbox/.
name: windows-ai-sandbox (${localEnv:PROFILE})
